ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 将文件夹添加到忽略列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If toggled on, notes will only track the most recent modification made on that day, overwriting any previous modifications made for the same day.
				When toggled off, modifications will be tracked based on the update interval.
ast.target:
如果开启，笔记将仅记录当天最近一次的修改，覆盖同一天之前的任何修改。
				如果关闭，修改将根据更新间隔进行记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ignored folders will prevent notes within them from being stamped with a date and time.
ast.target: \n\t\t\t\t被忽略的文件夹将阻止其中的笔记被打上日期和时间戳。\n\t\t\t\t

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Toggle between one tracking per day modifications or not.
ast.target: 切换是否每天仅记录一次修改。
